title: Knysna traffic lights malfunction for two months and counting
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Two months have passed since...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Two months have passed since the traffic lights at the busy intersection of Long Street and Knysna's Main Road stopped working, and the silence from officials has been deafening.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Two months have passed since the traffic lights at the busy intersection of Long Street and Knysna's Main Road stopped working, and the silence from officials has been deafening."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Despite the intersection being a known traffic hotspot, the malfunctioning lights remain unfixed, raising serious concerns among local motorists and residents.","html":"Despite the intersection being a known traffic hotspot, the malfunctioning lights remain unfixed, raising serious concerns among local motorists and residents."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Drivers have continued to navigate the junction cautiously, but many are now questioning the prolonged delay and the apparent lack of urgency from municipal authorities.","html":"Drivers have continued to navigate the junction cautiously, but many are now questioning the prolonged delay and the apparent lack of urgency from municipal authorities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A month ago, a group of Knysna municipal officials and department representatives were seen gathered at the intersection, sparking hope that a resolution was in the works.","html":"A month ago, a group of Knysna municipal officials and department representatives were seen gathered at the intersection, sparking hope that a resolution was in the works."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The traffic lights at the intersection of Long Street and Knysna's Main Road have been non-operational for two months now. Photos: Rozano Alie","html":"The traffic lights at the intersection of Long Street and Knysna's Main Road have been non-operational for two months now. Photos: Rozano Alie"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, no official statement, timeline, or plan of action has been made public.","html":"However, no official statement, timeline, or plan of action has been made public."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The lack of communication is fuelling growing frustration in the community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Do they plan to have this light fixed, or do they think if they ignore it, it will go away?\" asked Harry Griffin in a post on the Knysna Daily Facebook group. \"They don't even care enough to give us feedback. It's just been radio silence ever since.\"","html":"\"Do they plan to have this light fixed, or do they think if they ignore it, it will go away?\" asked Harry Griffin in a post on the Knysna Daily Facebook group. \"They don't even care enough to give us feedback. It's just been radio silence ever since.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"By the time of going to print, no official comment was received from Knysna Municipality.","html":"By the time of going to print, no official comment was received from Knysna Municipality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
